entities.description: teenage boy with a slim build, short dark hair, wearing a hooded raincoat and dark pants
medium-sized gray cat with sleek fur, large round eyes, and a slightly upright posture

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of a dark, rain-slicked city street at night. The boy walks alone under a glowing streetlamp, his raincoat hood pulled up against the heavy downpour.
Close-up of the boy stopping mid-step. He looks down in surprise at the cat sitting calmly on a wet concrete step, raindrops splashing around its paws.
Dynamic low-angle shot. The cat opens its mouth as if speaking, with dramatic speed lines and heavy rain streaks emphasizing the moment. The boy leans forward, eyes wide with shock.

Medium shot of the boy kneeling to the cat's level, a curious smile forming on his face. The cat sits confidently, tail curled, as heavy rain continues to fall around them in a moody, high-contrast composition.
